name: Loki-SOC-Auto-Project-Update
description: Automated SOC pipeline - Wazuh alert to TheHive case creation

steps.name: Webhook_1
steps.description: Receives alert from Wazuh via webhook

steps.name: SHA256-Hash
steps.description: Extracts SHA256 hash from the alert payload

steps.name: Virustotal_v3_1
steps.description: Enriches SHA256 hash with VirusTotal threat intelligence

steps.name: TheHive_1
steps.description: Creates incident case in TheHive with full alert context
steps.output: TheHive case ID and case URL

steps.name: Email_1
steps.description: Sends email notification to analyst with case details
